---
title: "The agent harness"
description: "Why agent demos break in production, and why the harness, the state, gates, traces, verification, and engineering around the model, is often the actual product."
image: cover.svg
format:
  html:
    body-classes: series-landing
image-alt: "Cover image for the series: The agent harness"
order: 4
parts: 5
date: 2026-04-14
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, description]
  feed:
    title: "The agent harness — series"
    description: "Why agent demos break in production, and why the harness, the state, gates, traces, verification, and engineering around the model, is often the actual product."
---

```{=html}
<img src="cover.svg" class="series-hero" alt="The agent harness — series cover">
```

A demo agent and a production agent run the same model. The difference is everything around it: how state is carried, where the run is gated, what gets traced, how output is verified before it is trusted. This series argues that this scaffolding, the harness, is usually where reliability is won or lost.

Read in order:
